\begin{table}[t]

        strict $\theta_K$ & 0.20 & 0.01 & -1 & 1 & 0.0\% & 0.0\% & 9.9\% & 0.0\% \\
        loose $\theta_K$ & 0.20 & 0.01 & 1 & 1 & 27.6\% & 18.2\% & 1.6\% & 1.4\% \\
        strict $\theta_a$ & 0.20 & 0.01 & 0 & 0 & 13.5\% & 11.5\% & 4.2\% & 0.7\% \\
        loose $\theta_a$ & 0.20 & 0.01 & 0 & 2 & 34.9\% & 22.4\% & 3.6\% & 0.8\% \\

    \end{tabular}
\end{table}
